provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, thin pale woman in her late 20s with dark circles under her eyes from watching screens for twelve-hour shifts, wearing a steel-blue uniform shirt unbuttoned at the throat with a signals intelligence department patch, over-ear monitoring headphones permanently around her neck, a cipher key on a chain tucked into her shirt, data tablet in a hip holster, sensible flat shoes, she looks like someone who knows things she is not allowed to talk about

judgment.explanation: Compact faction crew. Regulation shipboard clothing with appropriate wear and institutional identity markers. Muted palette, functional design.
